---
title: "Support"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Course template note
This repository is a forkable course template. If you are running this course at your institution, replace the channels below with your own forum / office-hours / contact info.
:::

## Getting help

If you get stuck — on content, on tooling, or on an AI assistant behaving unexpectedly — please use the following channels:

- **Course discussion forum**: *to be announced before week 1*. The forum is for questions of general interest; ask there first so other students benefit from the answer.
- **Office hours**: *to be announced before week 1*. Times will be posted here and announced in week 1.
- **Email**: *to be announced before week 1*. Reserve email for personal or sensitive issues; prefer the forum for technical questions.

## Technical issues

- For issues with this website (typos, broken links, wrong info), open an issue or a pull request on the [course repository](https://github.com/mdmanurung/ai-fluency-for-bio).
- For issues with Claude, ChatGPT, or other AI tools: check the vendor's status page first, then bring concrete reproductions to office hours.
- For issues running the [scRNA-seq modules](modules/module-01-raw-data-qc/README.md) — Colab quotas, Cell Ranger errors, Scanpy version mismatches — bring the full error message, the cell that failed, and your environment (Colab vs. local; package versions).

## Wellness

AI tooling is changing quickly, and it's easy to feel like you're "falling behind." You are not. Treat this course as a structured way to develop taste, not a sprint. Ask for help early.
